intro: Government and technology sectors bore the brunt of a concentrated wave of zero-day exploits between April 12 and April 26, 2026, with 24 articles covering 11 critical and 12 high-severity vulnerabilities. Threat actors Chaotic Eclipse and Interlock were observed leveraging flaws including CVE-2026-34621, CVE-2026-3502, CVE-2026-32183, CVE-2026-32201, and CVE-2024-20662. The campaign affected enterprises and healthcare globally, with particular impact across Southeast Asia.
